# Echelon Equity

> Student-led investment research platform focused on analyst development, institutional standards, and real work product.

## Canonical Site
- https://echelonequity.co/

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://echelonequity.co/
- Apply: https://echelonequity.co/apply
- Portfolio: https://echelonequity.co/portfolio
- Program: https://echelonequity.co/program
- Team: https://echelonequity.co/team

## Summary
Echelon Equity is a student-run investment research platform where analysts build investment research, financial models, valuation work, and memos under institutional standards.

The site explains the analyst program, research coverage, team, and application flow. It is intended for students interested in serious investment research and analyst development.

## Contact
- team@echelonequity.co
- admissions@echelonequity.co
